strengths: Proven experience in building and scaling complex software systems with multiple technologies
Demonstrated expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflows
Strong background in fintech infrastructure and scalable engineering practices
concerns: Lack of direct experience as a Chief Technology Officer or in a similar executive role

response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has a strong technical background with experience in building complex software systems and AI-agent infrastructure, which aligns with the job requirements. His experience in scaling engineering teams and practices is also relevant.
